Forward Indicators of Economic Cycles (Momentum of Flows)
← Back to dashboard

Forward Indicators of Economic Cycles (Momentum of Flows)

CoT sector flow & momentum: economic cycle proxies.

As of 2026-01-27

Gemini Summary

Signal Summary:

  • The 'Rates' sector shows significantly deteriorating speculative flows as of 2026-01-27, moving into a contractionary phase. Net 4-week flows are negative, and momentum is sharply down (1).
  • Conviction Band: High. Interpretation Confidence: High Confidence. Internal Conflict Flag: No.

Key Dynamics:

  • Average 4-week speculative flow for Rates is -1.30, with a majority (64%) of markets experiencing negative flows (1).
  • Flow momentum (`avg_flow_4w_mom`) plunged to -1.67, indicating a sharp deterioration in flow direction (1). The 3-week moving average of flows is also negative at -0.27 (1).
  • Conditional Invalidation: A sustained return to positive `avg_flow_4w_mom` above zero would reverse this interpretation.

Scenario Balance:

  • Base Case dominant: continued deceleration of flows and potential further downside for rates, supported by strong negative flow momentum (1).
  • Upside secondary: a notable shift to positive `avg_flow_4w_mom` and rising `pos_flow_share`, driven by changing expectations for monetary policy.
  • Downside residual: accelerating negative flows, potentially exacerbated by increasing `contrarian_flow_share` in crowded long positions.

Time Horizon & Aggregation:

  • Time Horizon: Cyclical (months). The 4-week flow and 3-week moving average components provide insight into short-to-medium term shifts in speculative sentiment and potential economic cycle turning points (1).
  • Aggregation Weight Hint: High. The clear and consistent deterioration across key flow metrics warrants significant weight in macro composites.

Macro Relevance:

  • This signal primarily informs Liquidity and Sentiment dimensions, particularly within fixed income markets (1).
  • It currently suggests a mid-to-late cycle position for Rates with deteriorating speculative interest.
  • It typically interacts with yield curve signals (2)(3), credit conditions (4), and overall macro growth indicators (5), potentially indicating tighter financial conditions or a growth slowdown.

Data & References:

  • df_cot_signals - `avg_flow_4w`, `pos_flow_share`, `neg_flow_share`, `trend_confirm_share`, `contrarian_flow_share`, `crowded_long_share`, `crowded_short_share`, `avg_flow_4w_mom`, `avg_flow_4w_3w_ma` for `Rates` sector, latest observation date 2026-01-27 (1).
  • Additional public datasets that would improve depth or reliability: Interest Rate Swaps positioning data (CFTC), SOFR futures positioning data (6)(7).
